title: DotNetCodeGenerationConfig
description: V2 configuration for .NET code generation (early-bound entity classes, action request/response wrappers, SDK message constants, and optionally XML metadata)

type.description: Config type discriminator. Must be 'dotnet' for .NET code generation.

version.description: Config version. V2 configs use the typed discriminator model.

target.description: Target framework. 'Modern' = net8.0+ (nullable annotations, implicit usings). 'Framework' = .NET Framework 4.6.2 (plugins, explicit usings, no nullable).

entities.description: Entity logical names to include in generation. Expanded at runtime by 'entityMask' and 'solutions'.

solutions.description: Solution unique names. Entities from these solutions are added to 'entities'.

entityMask.description: Wildcard pattern (e.g. 'contoso_*') to auto-include matching entities.

language.description: Language code for label localization. 0 = user language (default), or an explicit LCID (e.g. 1033).

requests.description: SDK message names to generate (actions, custom APIs, built-in messages like WhoAmI). The generator auto-detects whether each entry is a custom action, custom API, or built-in message. Entries with parameters produce typed Request/Response classes. All entries produce SDK message name constants.

globalOptionSets.description: Global OptionSet logical names to generate as standalone constants.

virtualProperties.description: Make generated entity properties virtual (for mocking/proxying).

editableReadOnlyProperties.description: Generate setters even for read-only attributes.

include.description: Controls which optional sections are included in generated entity classes. All default to true.

context.description: Generate OrganizationServiceContext (DataContext) partial class with IQueryable sets.

options.description: Generate nested Options class with OptionSet value constants.

logicalNames.description: Generate nested LogicalNames class with attribute logical name constants.

relations.description: Generate nested Relations class with relationship schema name constants.

alternateKeys.description: Generate nested AlternateKeys class with alternate key logical name constants.

metadata.description: Generate XML metadata files (DataContractSerializer dumps of EntityMetadata). Off by default.
